article_meta.title: Tillis: 'Noem Is Out of Her Depth,' She's 'Not Competent' 7 Pam Key28 Jan 2026 Wednesday on CNN's "The Lead," Sen

reasoning: The model improperly flagged quoted statements from Sen. Tillis as author bias and misapplied a label, though it did identify structural omission/slant. Multiple attribution violations and some mislabeled/overreaching items reduce quality.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged Tillis’s quoted language as author bias in two items, violating the attribution rule, though not across all items.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two items are clear false positives (quoted text and wrong label); one is debatable; one is reasonable (omission).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Little author prose to mine; main structural omission/slant was noted, so few misses.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels include one clear misapplication (Omission of Source Attribution) and one debatable (Negativity Bias); omission label is reasonable for lack of response.
